prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-148LSDTSLSARSB-20PC-LG-BLCK-1 Product Type: TOY_VEHICLE_SET Brand (from catalog): Kid Fun Existing Title: KidFun 1:48 Large Scale Kids Toy Train Set with Lights Sounds Real Smoke, Black Description: This Holiday Train Set is the ideal gift for any child during the holiday season. They will enjoy the realistic features of the train accessories while getting into the holiday spirit.

The train is able to zoom around the track blowing smoke and running with working lights. The authentic train whistle sound coming from the engine compartment will make the experience real for your child. Each train set comes with curved and straight track piece and can create an oval track. The track pieces easily snap into place and come apart for convenient transportation. The train is a 1:48 (O) scale set.

The set comes with 4 train cars, 4 straight tracks, and 12 curved tracks. This battery operated set will ensure hours of fun for kids.

This is a great gift idea for young kids and train set collectors alike. Search Terms: train set toys Christmas decorations Christmas tree Christmas decor Christmas train sets for under the tree Christmas train Christmas tree train holiday decor kids learning and education toys unique gifts DIY projects Features: - LARGE SCALE TOY TRAIN SET: If your little ones like trains, they'll love this large scale 20 piece train set they can put together with friends family! With real, billowing smoke, fun sounds and lights, the train set is both fun and a great learning tool too! - REAL WHISTLING TRAIN: The toy train features a real whistling sound coming from the engine compartment, making the toy train set even more fun and interactive as it moves around the tracks - REAL SMOKE LIGHTS AND MUSIC: The train set is able to move around the track blowing real smoke, alongside working lights and music - TOY TRAIN SET TRACKS: Each train toy set comes with curved and straight track pieces and creates an oval track; the track pieces easily snap into place and come apart for convenient storage - FUN LEARNING TOOL: Putting together the toy train set with kids is fun project that allows them to improve on dexterity and coordination, creativity and cognitive problem solving skills === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Kid Fun 20-Pc Large Scale Black Toy Train Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: Real Smoke, Lights And Whistling Sound, Snap-Together Tracks, Battery Operated, Educational Learning Tool

openai.title_differentiation: Real Smoke, Lights And Sounds, Whistling Engine, 20 Piece Oval Track, Battery Operated, Great Gift For Kids
